name: crop_spec
description: Crop a trim spec to one or more virtual-timeline windows. Produces a new trim spec — no video encode.

output.description: Path to the cropped trim spec JSON file

params.name: keeps
params.description: Windows to keep as a JSON array of [start, end] pairs, e.g. [[0, 2.4], [13.84, 18.33]]. Use null for end to mean end-of-clip.
